ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., 1971q1, 1971q2) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the quarter */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* GDP value for the quarter */,
  "cpi" TEXT /* CPI value for the quarter */,
  "stn" TEXT /* Short-term interest rate (STN) for the quarter */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oil_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oil price data point */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., 1971q1, 1971q2) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the quarter */,
  "oil_price" TEXT /* Oil price for the quarter */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the data */,
  "oil_type" TEXT /* Type of oil (e.g., Brent, WTI) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oil_prices_quarter FOREIGN KEY ("quarter") REFERENCES economic_data ("quarter")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Research, Analytics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
